sections.paragraph:
ὑπερεκτείνω (Proclus, Theol. 59 p. 56, 35; Damasc., Princ. 284; Suda) stretch out beyond ὑπερεκτείνομεν ἑαυτούς we are overextending ourselves (beyond the limits set by God) 2 Cor 10:14.—DELG s.v. τανυ-E.

Suda Suda = a lexical work (freq. cited as Suidas in handbooks); X a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1033
